title: Intensely Jammy Croatian Chicken Pasta
description: A light and flavorful Croatian dish featuring parmesan cheese and a jammy sauce, perfect for meal prep. This low-calorie-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside, then add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute until fragrant.
Stir in the canned crushed tomatoes, dried basil, salt, and black pepper, and bring the sauce to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and become jammy.
Stir in the shredded parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the jammy sauce until the pasta is well coated.
Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and toss with the pasta and sauce until heated through.
